title: Redexed
description: enchantment overhaul mod forked off ZoeyTheEgoist's Indexed
body:
Redexed is a 1.20.1 update of ZoeyTheEgoist's [Indexed](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/indexed) with new features and more mod support.

Natively supported mods:
* Additional Additions
* AdventureZ
* Amarite
* Aquamirae
* BetterEnd
* BetterNether
* Biome Makeover
* Clutter
* Conjuring
* Create
* Create Garnished
* Crossbow Expansion
* DragonLoot
* Farmer's Delight
* Frostiful
* Galosphere
* Go Fish
* Guarding
* Harvest Scythes
* Illager Invasion
* Mythic Metals
* Mythic Upgrades
* Nether's Delight
* Winterly
* and some others I probably forgot about.

You can add or change values for items in `config/indexed_modded_items.json` and customize the mod in `config/indexed_properties`.

By default, `experimental-curse-overhaul` is set to `true` (you can change this in `indexed.properties`) which will make it so curses will not count towards the slot limit of an item and will reduce the number of consumed slots by the tier of the curse (so in practicality, an item with a level 2 curse will have 2 extra enchantment slots). This works best with a mod like Biome Makeover that adds many new curses!
